overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing exploration of an ancient Egyptian village. The player examines a decorated sarcophagus, explores courtyards and workshops containing mummies, and walks through sandy streets with mud-brick buildings and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: sarcophagus storage room with ancient Egyptian artifacts

events.description: camera pulls back from close-up of sarcophagus to reveal the room and empty wooden coffin

agents.ego_description: examining the decorated Egyptian sarcophagus and panning down to view the hieroglyphic details and craftsmanship

entered.detail: colorful Egyptian sarcophagus with hieroglyphics and painted face
open wooden coffin base lying on the ground
row of cylindrical stone columns in the background
textured earthen walls with faded paint

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close examination of a richly decorated Egyptian sarcophagus. The camera slowly pans down to reveal hieroglyphic details, then pulls back to show the empty wooden coffin and the enclosed storage room with stone pillars.

events.description: exits the enclosed sarcophagus room into the bright sunlit courtyard
lighting shifts from dim interior to harsh bright sunlight with strong shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit courtyard, examining the surroundings and large clay pottery

entered.detail: large black and red clay vessel sitting on wooden platform
tall wooden ladder leaning against the building wall
arched stone passageway leading to another area
palm trees visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dark interior into a bright sandy courtyard surrounded by mud-brick buildings. The camera explores the area, showing a large clay pot in the center, a wooden ladder against the wall, and a stone archway leading further into the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: mummification workshop with bodies on tables

events.description: enters the dark interior of the mummification workshop

agents.ego_description: entering the mummification workshop and observing the mummified bodies on the wooden tables

entered.detail: ancient Egyptian mummies wrapped in linen lying on wooden tables
large striped clay jars for storing organs or supplies
wooden work tables holding the mummified remains

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit workshop where mummified bodies rest on wooden tables. Clay storage jars line the walls, and the room has the appearance of an ancient Egyptian embalming house.

events.description: exits the mummy workshop back into the sunlit village courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square, passing by a running child and approaching a seated villager near storage jars

notable_agents.action: child running across the sandy courtyard from left to right
villager sitting on the ground near a large storage jar

entered.detail: open sandy area surrounded by mud-brick buildings
fabric awnings providing shade over doorways
massive clay jar with rope handles

segments.scene_description: Exiting the workshop, the player enters a sunlit village square with palm trees and mud-brick buildings. A child runs across the sandy ground, and a villager sits near a large storage jar. Wooden canopies provide shade over some doorways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley leading to covered courtyard

events.description: enters a covered courtyard area with fabric canopies overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow alleys and entering a covered courtyard with an outdoor oven and work areas

entered.detail: passage between high mud-brick walls
open area with wooden posts and fabric canopy roofing
domed clay oven with fire burning inside and smoke rising
wooden poles and beams stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow alley between mud-brick walls into a covered courtyard. An outdoor clay oven burns with visible flames and smoke, and wooden scaffolding leans against the walls. The area is shaded by fabric canopies.

agents.ego_description: approaching the large decorated stone gate with hieroglyphic carvings on both sides

entered.detail: large stone gateway with detailed hieroglyphic carvings and figures on both pillars
ancient Egyptian figures and symbols carved into the stone gate

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an impressive stone gate adorned with colorful hieroglyphic carvings depicting Egyptian figures and symbols. The gate stands between mud-brick buildings with palm trees visible in the background, suggesting an entrance to a significant area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the intimate, dark interior of a funerary chamber out into the vibrant, sun-drenched streets of an ancient Egyptian village. It begins with a close examination of a decorated sarcophagus and its hieroglyphics before pulling back to exit the stone pillars of the storage room into a bright, sandy courtyard filled with clay pots and mud-brick walls. The camera then shifts from the blinding sunlight into the dim, oppressive atmosphere of an embalming workshop lined with mummified bodies and storage jars, before emerging once more into a lively village square where palm trees sway and residents move across the sand. As the path narrows into a shaded alley, the scene transitions through a covered courtyard featuring a smoking clay oven and wooden scaffolding. Finally, the movement culminates at an impressive stone gate adorned with colorful carvings, standing as a grand threshold between the humble mud-brick dwellings and the wider landscape.
